The event camera is mechanically decoupled from vibrations by a spring isolation mechanism, enabling high-quality tactile imaging of both dynamic and stationary objects. For algorithm design, we propose an IMU-guided temporal filter to enhance imaging consistency, improving MSNR by 24%. Moreover, we systematically optimize SWTac with vibration parameters, event camera settings and elastomer properties. Motivated by asymmetric edge features, we also implement contact surface estimation by U-Net. Experimental validation demonstrates SWTac's 0.2 mm texture resolution, 98% stone classification accuracy, and 0.15 N force estimation error, while SandWorm demonstrates versatile locomotion (up to 12.5 mm/s) in challenging terrains, successfully executes pipeline dredging and subsurface exploration in complex granular media (observed 90% success rate). Field experiments further confirm the system's practical performance.
tldr: The paper introduces SandWorm, a biomimetic robot with a novel visuotactile sensor (SWTac) for perception and locomotion in granular media, demonstrating high resolution tactile imaging and versatile locomotion in complex terrains.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SandWorm，一种具有新型视觉触觉传感器（SWTac）的仿生机器人，用于在颗粒介质中的感知和运动，展示了高分辨率的触觉成像和在复杂地形中的通用运动能力。
summary_zh: 颗粒状介质中的感知由于不可预测的粒子动力学而仍然具有挑战性。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 SandWorm，一种仿生螺旋驱动机器人，通过蠕动运动增强其移动能力；以及 SWTac，一种新型基于事件的视觉触觉传感器，配备主动振动弹性体。事件相机通过弹簧隔离机制与振动进行机械解耦，从而能够对动态和静态物体进行高质量的触觉成像。在算法设计方面，我们提出了一种 IMU 引导的时域滤波器来增强成像一致性，将 MSNR 提高了 24%。此外，我们系统地优化了 SWTac 的振动参数、事件相机设置和弹性体属性。受非对称边缘特征的启发，我们还实现了基于 U-Net 的接触表面估计。实验验证表明，SWTac 具有 0.2 毫米的纹理分辨率、98% 的石头分类准确率和 0.15 牛的力估计误差，而 SandWorm 在具有挑战性的地形中表现出多功能的移动能力（高达 12.5 毫米/秒），成功地在复杂的颗粒状介质中执行了管道疏浚和地下勘探（观察到 90% 的成功率）。现场实验进一步证实了该系统的实际性能。

title: Sample Efficient Learning of Body-Environment Interaction of an Under-Actuated System
summary: Geometric mechanics provides valuable insights into how biological and robotic systems use changes in shape to move by mechanically interacting with their environment. In high-friction environments it provides that the entire interaction is captured by the ``motility map''. Here we compare methods for learning the motility map from motion tracking data of a physical robot created specifically to test these methods by having under-actuated degrees of freedom and a hard to model interaction with its substrate. We compared four modeling approaches in terms of their ability to predict body velocity from shape change within the same gait, across gaits, and across speeds. Our results show a trade-off between simpler methods which are superior on small training datasets, and more sophisticated methods, which are superior when more training data is available.
tldr: This paper compares different methods for learning a 'motility map' of an under-actuated robot interacting with its environment, showing a trade-off between simpler and more complex models based on the size of the training dataset.
tldr_zh: 本文比较了学习欠驱动机器人与环境交互的“运动图”的不同方法，展示了基于训练数据集大小的简单模型和复杂模型之间的权衡。
summary_zh: 几何力学为深入了解生物和机器人系统如何利用形状变化，通过与环境的机械相互作用来移动提供了有价值的见解。在高摩擦环境中，它表明整个相互作用都被“运动性映射”所捕获。本文中，我们比较了从物理机器人的运动跟踪数据中学习运动性映射的方法，该机器人专门用于测试这些方法，其特点是欠驱动的自由度和与基底之间难以建模的相互作用。我们比较了四种建模方法的性能，评估它们在同一步态、不同步态和不同速度下，从形状变化预测身体速度的能力。我们的结果表明，在较小的训练数据集上，简单的建模方法表现更优，而在拥有更多训练数据时，更复杂的方法更具优势，两者之间存在一种权衡关系。

title: SUNSET -- A Sensor-fUsioN based semantic SegmEnTation exemplar for ROS-based self-adaptation
summary: The fact that robots are getting deployed more often in dynamic environments, together with the increasing complexity of their software systems, raises the need for self-adaptive approaches. In these environments robotic software systems increasingly operate amid (1) uncertainties, where symptoms are easy to observe but root causes are ambiguous, or (2) multiple uncertainties appear concurrently. We present SUNSET, a ROS2-based exemplar that enables rigorous, repeatable evaluation of architecture-based self-adaptation in such conditions. It implements a sensor fusion semantic-segmentation pipeline driven by a trained Machine Learning (ML) model whose input preprocessing can be perturbed to induce realistic performance degradations. The exemplar exposes five observable symptoms, where each can be caused by different root causes and supports concurrent uncertainties spanning self-healing and self-optimisation. SUNSET includes the segmentation pipeline, a trained ML model, uncertainty-injection scripts, a baseline controller, and step-by-step integration and evaluation documentation to facilitate reproducible studies and fair comparison.
tldr: The paper introduces SUNSET, a ROS2-based exemplar for evaluating self-adaptive robotics systems, particularly in environments with uncertainties, using a sensor fusion semantic segmentation pipeline.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为 SUNSET 的基于ROS2的示例，旨在评估自适应机器人系统，尤其是在具有不确定性的环境中，该系统使用传感器融合语义分割管道。
summary_zh: 机器人越来越多地部署在动态环境中，以及其软件系统日益复杂的事实，提出了对自适应方法的需求。在这些环境中，机器人软件系统越来越多地在以下情况下运行：(1) 不确定性，其中症状易于观察但根本原因不明确；或 (2) 同时出现多个不确定性。我们提出了 SUNSET，这是一个基于 ROS2 的范例，能够在这些条件下对基于架构的自适应进行严谨、可重复的评估。它实现了一个由训练过的机器学习 (ML) 模型驱动的传感器融合语义分割流水线，该流水线的输入预处理可以被扰动以诱导真实的性能下降。该范例暴露了五个可观察的症状，每个症状可能由不同的根本原因引起，并支持跨越自我修复和自我优化的并发不确定性。SUNSET 包括分割流水线、训练好的 ML 模型、不确定性注入脚本、基线控制器以及便于可重复研究和公平比较的逐步集成和评估文档。

title: TractRLFusion: A GPT-Based Multi-Critic Policy Fusion Framework for Fiber Tractography
summary: Tractography plays a pivotal role in the non-invasive reconstruction of white matter fiber pathways, providing vital information on brain connectivity and supporting precise neurosurgical planning. Although traditional methods relied mainly on classical deterministic and probabilistic approaches, recent progress has benefited from supervised deep learning (DL) and deep reinforcement learning (DRL) to improve tract reconstruction. A persistent challenge in tractography is accurately reconstructing white matter tracts while minimizing spurious connections. To address this, we propose TractRLFusion, a novel GPT-based policy fusion framework that integrates multiple RL policies through a data-driven fusion strategy. Our method employs a two-stage training data selection process for effective policy fusion, followed by a multi-critic fine-tuning phase to enhance robustness and generalization. Experiments on HCP, ISMRM, and TractoInferno datasets demonstrate that TractRLFusion outperforms individual RL policies as well as state-of-the-art classical and DRL methods in accuracy and anatomical reliability.
tldr: TractRLFusion introduces a GPT-based policy fusion framework for fiber tractography, combining multiple RL policies to improve accuracy and anatomical reliability, outperforming existing methods on several datasets.
tldr_zh: TractRLFusion 提出了一种基于 GPT 的策略融合框架，用于纤维束追踪，它融合了多个强化学习策略，以提高准确性和解剖学可靠性，并在多个数据集上优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 纤维束示踪术在白质纤维通路的非侵入性重建中发挥着关键作用，为大脑连接性提供重要信息，并支持精准神经外科规划。尽管传统方法主要依赖于经典的确定性和概率性方法，但最近的进展受益于监督深度学习 (DL) 和深度强化学习 (DRL)，以改进纤维束重建。纤维束示踪术中一个持续的挑战是准确重建白质纤维束，同时最小化虚假连接。为了解决这个问题，我们提出 TractRLFusion，一种新颖的基于 GPT 的策略融合框架，该框架通过数据驱动的融合策略集成多个 RL 策略。我们的方法采用两阶段训练数据选择过程，以实现有效的策略融合，然后进行多评论家微调阶段，以增强鲁棒性和泛化能力。在 HCP、ISMRM 和 TractoInferno 数据集上的实验表明，在准确性和解剖学可靠性方面，TractRLFusion 优于单个 RL 策略以及最先进的经典和 DRL 方法。

title: Resilient Routing: Risk-Aware Dynamic Routing in Smart Logistics via Spatiotemporal Graph Learning
summary: With the rapid development of the e-commerce industry, the logistics network is experiencing unprecedented pressure. The traditional static routing strategy most time cannot tolerate the traffic congestion and fluctuating retail demand. In this paper, we propose a Risk-Aware Dynamic Routing(RADR) framework which integrates Spatiotemporal Graph Neural Networks (ST-GNN) with combinatorial optimization. We first construct a logistics topology graph by using the discrete GPS data using spatial clustering methods. Subsequently, a hybrid deep learning model combining Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) and Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) is adopted to extract spatial correlations and temporal dependencies for predicting future congestion risks. These prediction results are then integrated into a dynamic edge weight mechanism to perform path planning. We evaluated the framework on the Smart Logistics Dataset 2024, which contains real-world Internet of Things(IoT) sensor data. The experimental results show that the RADR algorithm significantly enhances the resilience of the supply chain. Particularly in the case study of high congestion scenarios, our method reduces the potential congestion risk exposure by 19.3% while only increasing the transportation distance by 2.1%. This empirical evidence confirms that the proposed data-driven approach can effectively balance delivery efficiency and operational safety.
tldr: The paper proposes a Risk-Aware Dynamic Routing (RADR) framework using Spatiotemporal Graph Neural Networks (ST-GNN) to predict congestion risks and optimize logistics routing, demonstrating improved resilience and reduced congestion in smart logistics using a real-world dataset.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于时空图神经网络（ST-GNN）的风险感知动态路由（RADR）框架，用于预测拥堵风险并优化物流路线，通过真实世界数据集证明了其在智能物流中提高弹性和减少拥堵的能力。
summary_zh: 随着电子商务行业的迅猛发展，物流网络正面临前所未有的压力。传统的静态路由策略在大多数情况下无法承受交通拥堵和波动的零售需求。本文提出了一种风险感知的动态路由(RADR)框架，该框架集成了时空图神经网络(ST-GNN)与组合优化。我们首先使用空间聚类方法，通过离散的GPS数据构建物流拓扑图。随后，采用结合了图卷积网络(GCN)和门控循环单元(GRU)的混合深度学习模型，提取空间相关性和时间依赖性，以预测未来的拥堵风险。这些预测结果随后被整合到动态边权重机制中，用于执行路径规划。我们使用包含真实世界物联网(IoT)传感器数据的“智慧物流数据集2024”对该框架进行了评估。实验结果表明，RADR算法显著增强了供应链的韧性。尤其是在高拥堵场景的案例研究中，我们的方法将潜在的拥堵风险暴露降低了19.3%，而运输距离仅增加了2.1%。这些经验证据证实，所提出的数据驱动方法可以有效地平衡交付效率和运营安全。

title: CatMaster: An Agentic Autonomous System for Computational Heterogeneous Catalysis Research
summary:
Density functional theory (DFT) is widely used to connect atomic structure with catalytic behavior, but computational heterogeneous catalysis studies often require long workflows that are costly, iterative, and sensitive to setup choices. Besides the intrinsic cost and accuracy limits of first-principles calculations, practical workflow issues such as keeping references consistent, preparing many related inputs, recovering from failed runs on computing clusters, and maintaining a complete record of what was done, can slow down projects and make results difficult to reproduce or extend.
  Here we present CatMaster, a large-language-model (LLM)-driven agent system that turns natural language requests into complete calculation workspaces, including structures, inputs, outputs, logs, and a concise run record. CatMaster maintains a persistent project record of key facts, constraints, and file pointers to support inspection and restartability. It is paired with a multi-fidelity tool library that covers rapid surrogate relaxations and high-fidelity DFT calculations for validation when needed. We demonstrate CatMaster on four demonstrations of increasing complexity: an O2 spin-state check with remote execution, BCC Fe surface energies with a protocol-sensitivity study and CO adsorption site ranking, high-throughput Pt--Ni--Cu alloy screening for hydrogen evolution reaction (HER) descriptors with surrogate-to-DFT validation, and a demonstration beyond the predefined tool set, including equation-of-state fitting for BCC Fe and CO-FeN4-graphene single-atom catalyst geometry preparation. By reducing manual scripting and bookkeeping while keeping the full evidence trail, CatMaster aims to help catalysis researchers focus on modeling choices and chemical interpretation rather than workflow management.
tldr: The paper introduces CatMaster, an LLM-driven agentic system to automate and streamline computational heterogeneous catalysis research workflows, improving reproducibility and allowing researchers to focus on higher-level modeling and interpretation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为CatMaster的基于LLM的智能体系统，旨在自动化和简化计算非均相催化研究工作流程，提高可重复性，并使研究人员能够专注于更高级别的建模和解释。
summary_zh:
密度泛函理论(DFT)被广泛用于连接原子结构与催化行为，但计算异相催化研究通常需要冗长的工作流程，这些流程成本高昂、迭代性强，且对设置选择敏感。除了第一性原理计算固有的成本和精度限制外，实际工作流程问题，如保持参考文献一致性、准备许多相关输入、从计算集群上的失败运行中恢复，以及维护完整的工作记录，都可能减慢项目进度，并使结果难以重现或扩展。

  本文介绍CatMaster，一个由大型语言模型(LLM)驱动的代理系统，它可以将自然语言请求转化为完整的计算工作空间，包括结构、输入、输出、日志和简洁的运行记录。CatMaster维护一个持久的项目记录，记录关键事实、约束和文件指针，以支持检查和可重启性。它与一个多保真度工具库配对，该工具库涵盖快速代理弛豫和高保真度DFT计算，用于在需要时进行验证。我们通过四个复杂度递增的演示来展示CatMaster：一个带有远程执行的O2自旋态检查、一个带有协议敏感性研究和CO吸附位点排序的BCC Fe表面能计算，一个用于氢析出反应(HER)描述符的Pt--Ni--Cu合金高通量筛选，以及一个超出预定义工具集的演示，包括BCC Fe的状态方程拟合和CO-FeN4-石墨烯单原子催化剂几何结构制备。通过减少手动脚本编写和记账工作，同时保留完整的证据链，CatMaster旨在帮助催化研究人员专注于建模选择和化学解释，而不是工作流程管理。

title: Graph Neural Networks are Heuristics
summary: We demonstrate that a single training trajectory can transform a graph neural network into an unsupervised heuristic for combinatorial optimization. Focusing on the Travelling Salesman Problem, we show that encoding global structural constraints as an inductive bias enables a non-autoregressive model to generate solutions via direct forward passes, without search, supervision, or sequential decision-making. At inference time, dropout and snapshot ensembling allow a single model to act as an implicit ensemble, reducing optimality gaps through increased solution diversity. Our results establish that graph neural networks do not require supervised training nor explicit search to be effective. Instead, they can internalize global combinatorial structure and function as strong, learned heuristics. This reframes the role of learning in combinatorial optimization: from augmenting classical algorithms to directly instantiating new heuristics.
tldr: This paper demonstrates that Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) can be trained to act as unsupervised heuristics for combinatorial optimization problems like the Traveling Salesman Problem, generating solutions without supervision or search.
tldr_zh: 该论文展示了图神经网络 (GNN) 可以被训练为组合优化问题（如旅行商问题）的无监督启发式方法，无需监督或搜索即可生成解决方案。
summary_zh: 我们证明，可以通过单一训练轨迹将图神经网络转化为用于组合优化的无监督启发式算法。以旅行商问题为例，我们展示了将全局结构约束编码为归纳偏置，能够使非自回归模型通过直接前向传递生成解决方案，而无需搜索、监督或序列决策。在推理时，dropout和快照集成使得单个模型能够充当隐式集成，通过增加解的多样性来缩小最优性差距。我们的结果表明，图神经网络无需监督训练或显式搜索也能发挥作用。相反，它们可以内化全局组合结构并作为强大的、学习到的启发式算法发挥作用。这重新定义了学习在组合优化中的作用：从增强经典算法到直接实例化新的启发式算法。

title: Integrating Virtual Reality and Large Language Models for Team-Based Non-Technical Skills Training and Evaluation in the Operating Room
summary: Although effective teamwork and communication are critical to surgical safety, structured training for non-technical skills (NTS) remains limited compared with technical simulation. The ACS/APDS Phase III Team-Based Skills Curriculum calls for scalable tools that both teach and objectively assess these competencies during laparoscopic emergencies. We introduce the Virtual Operating Room Team Experience (VORTeX), a multi-user virtual reality (VR) platform that integrates immersive team simulation with large language model (LLM) analytics to train and evaluate communication, decision-making, teamwork, and leadership. Team dialogue is analyzed using structured prompts derived from the Non-Technical Skills for Surgeons (NOTSS) framework, enabling automated classification of behaviors and generation of directed interaction graphs that quantify communication structure and hierarchy. Two laparoscopic emergency scenarios, pneumothorax and intra-abdominal bleeding, were implemented to elicit realistic stress and collaboration. Twelve surgical professionals completed pilot sessions at the 2024 SAGES conference, rating VORTeX as intuitive, immersive, and valuable for developing teamwork and communication. The LLM consistently produced interpretable communication networks reflecting expected operative hierarchies, with surgeons as central integrators, nurses as initiators, and anesthesiologists as balanced intermediaries. By integrating immersive VR with LLM-driven behavioral analytics, VORTeX provides a scalable, privacy-compliant framework for objective assessment and automated, data-informed debriefing across distributed training environments.
tldr: This paper presents VORTeX, a VR platform integrated with LLMs for training and evaluating non-technical surgical skills, showing promise in scalable and objective assessment of teamwork in simulated operating room environments.
tldr_zh: 这篇论文介绍了VORTeX，一个结合VR和LLM的平台，用于培训和评估外科手术中的非技术技能。该平台在模拟手术室环境中对团队合作进行可扩展和客观的评估方面显示出潜力。
summary_zh: 尽管高效的团队合作和沟通对于手术安全至关重要，但与技术模拟相比，针对非技术技能（NTS）的结构化培训仍然有限。美国外科医师学会/住院医师项目主任协会（ACS/APDS）第三阶段团队技能课程要求开发可扩展的工具，以便在腹腔镜紧急情况下教授和客观评估这些能力。我们推出了虚拟手术室团队体验（VORTeX），一个多用户虚拟现实（VR）平台，它整合了沉浸式团队模拟和大语言模型（LLM）分析，以训练和评估沟通、决策、团队合作和领导力。团队对话通过基于外科医生非技术技能（NOTSS）框架的结构化提示进行分析，从而能够自动分类行为并生成定向交互图，量化沟通结构和层级关系。我们实现了两种腹腔镜紧急情况场景，分别是气胸和腹腔内出血，以引发真实的压力和协作。在2024年SAGES会议上，12名外科专业人员完成了试点会话，他们认为VORTeX直观、沉浸式，并且对发展团队合作和沟通非常有价值。大语言模型始终如一地生成可解释的沟通网络，反映了预期的手术层级，其中外科医生是核心整合者，护士是发起者，麻醉师是平衡的中间人。通过将沉浸式虚拟现实与大语言模型驱动的行为分析相结合，VORTeX提供了一个可扩展、符合隐私要求的框架，用于在分布式培训环境中进行客观评估和自动化的、数据驱动的汇报。

title: CooperBench: Why Coding Agents Cannot be Your Teammates Yet
summary: Resolving team conflicts requires not only task-specific competence, but also social intelligence to find common ground and build consensus. As AI agents increasingly collaborate on complex work, they must develop coordination capabilities to function as effective teammates. Yet we hypothesize that current agents lack these capabilities. To test this, we introduce CooperBench, a benchmark of over 600 collaborative coding tasks across 12 libraries in 4 programming languages. Each task assigns two agents different features that can be implemented independently but may conflict without proper coordination. Tasks are grounded in real open-source repositories with expert-written tests. Evaluating state-of-the-art coding agents, we observe the curse of coordination: agents achieve on average 30% lower success rates when working together compared to performing both tasks individually. This contrasts sharply with human teams, where adding teammates typically improves productivity. Our analysis reveals three key issues: (1) communication channels become jammed with vague, ill-timed, and inaccurate messages; (2) even with effective communication, agents deviate from their commitments; and (3) agents often hold incorrect expectations about others' plans and communication. Through large-scale simulation, we also observe rare but interesting emergent coordination behavior including role division, resource division, and negotiation. Our research presents a novel benchmark for collaborative coding and calls for a shift from pursuing individual agent capability to developing social intelligence.
tldr: The paper introduces CooperBench, a benchmark for collaborative coding, and demonstrates that current coding agents perform significantly worse in teams than individually due to communication and coordination issues, highlighting the need for social intelligence in AI agents.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了协作编码的基准测试 CooperBench，并表明当前的编码代理在团队中的表现明显低于单独的表现，因为存在沟通和协调问题，强调了人工智能代理中社交智能的需求。
summary_zh: 解决团队冲突不仅需要特定任务的能力，还需要社交智能来寻找共同点和建立共识。随着人工智能代理越来越多地协同完成复杂工作，它们必须发展出协调能力才能发挥有效队友的作用。然而，我们假设当前的代理缺乏这些能力。为了验证这一点，我们引入了 CooperBench，这是一个包含 600 多个协同编码任务的基准测试，涵盖 4 种编程语言的 12 个库。每个任务为两个代理分配可以独立实现的不同功能，但如果没有适当的协调，可能会发生冲突。任务基于真实的开源仓库，并附有专家编写的测试。通过评估最先进的编码代理，我们观察到协调的诅咒：与单独执行两项任务相比，代理协同工作时的平均成功率降低了 30%。这与人类团队形成鲜明对比，在人类团队中，增加队友通常会提高生产力。我们的分析揭示了三个关键问题：（1）通信渠道充斥着模糊、不合时宜和不准确的消息；（2）即使进行了有效的沟通，代理也会偏离其承诺；（3）代理通常对其他人计划和沟通持有不正确的期望。通过大规模模拟，我们还观察到罕见但有趣的涌现式协调行为，包括角色分工、资源分配和协商。我们的研究提出了一个用于协同编码的新型基准测试，并呼吁从追求个体代理能力转向发展社交智能。

title: MVGD-Net: A Novel Motion-aware Video Glass Surface Detection Network
summary: Glass surface ubiquitous in both daily life and professional environments presents a potential threat to vision-based systems, such as robot and drone navigation. To solve this challenge, most recent studies have shown significant interest in Video Glass Surface Detection (VGSD). We observe that objects in the reflection (or transmission) layer appear farther from the glass surfaces. Consequently, in video motion scenarios, the notable reflected (or transmitted) objects on the glass surface move slower than objects in non-glass regions within the same spatial plane, and this motion inconsistency can effectively reveal the presence of glass surfaces. Based on this observation, we propose a novel network, named MVGD-Net, for detecting glass surfaces in videos by leveraging motion inconsistency cues. Our MVGD-Net features three novel modules: the Cross-scale Multimodal Fusion Module (CMFM) that integrates extracted spatial features and estimated optical flow maps, the History Guided Attention Module (HGAM) and Temporal Cross Attention Module (TCAM), both of which further enhances temporal features. A Temporal-Spatial Decoder (TSD) is also introduced to fuse the spatial and temporal features for generating the glass region mask. Furthermore, for learning our network, we also propose a large-scale dataset, which comprises 312 diverse glass scenarios with a total of 19,268 frames. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our MVGD-Net outperforms relevant state-of-the-art methods.
tldr: This paper introduces MVGD-Net, a novel motion-aware network for detecting glass surfaces in videos using motion inconsistency cues, and presents a new large-scale dataset for training and evaluation.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为MVGD-Net的新型运动感知网络，该网络利用运动不一致性线索检测视频中的玻璃表面，并提出了一个新的大型数据集用于训练和评估。
summary_zh: 玻璃表面在日常生活和专业环境中无处不在，对基于视觉的系统（如机器人和无人机导航）构成了潜在威胁。为了解决这一挑战，最近的研究对视频玻璃表面检测（VGSD）表现出了浓厚的兴趣。我们观察到，反射（或透射）层中的物体看起来比玻璃表面更远。因此，在视频运动场景中，玻璃表面上显著反射（或透射）的物体比同一空间平面内非玻璃区域中的物体移动得更慢，这种运动不一致性可以有效地揭示玻璃表面的存在。基于这一观察，我们提出了一种名为MVGD-Net的新型网络，通过利用运动不一致性线索来检测视频中的玻璃表面。我们的MVGD-Net具有三个创新模块：跨尺度多模态融合模块（CMFM），它集成了提取的空间特征和估计的光流图；历史引导注意力模块（HGAM）和时间交叉注意力模块（TCAM），两者都进一步增强了时间特征。 同时，还引入了一个时空解码器（TSD）来融合空间和时间特征，以生成玻璃区域掩码。此外，为了训练我们的网络，我们还提出了一个大规模数据集，该数据集包含312个不同的玻璃场景，总计19,268帧。 广泛的实验表明，我们的MVGD-Net优于相关的最先进方法。

title: ParkingTwin: Training-Free Streaming 3D Reconstruction for Parking-Lot Digital Twins
summary: High-fidelity parking-lot digital twins provide essential priors for path planning, collision checking, and perception validation in Automated Valet Parking (AVP). Yet robot-oriented reconstruction faces a trilemma: sparse forward-facing views cause weak parallax and ill-posed geometry; dynamic occlusions and extreme lighting hinder stable texture fusion; and neural rendering typically needs expensive offline optimization, violating edge-side streaming constraints. We propose ParkingTwin, a training-free, lightweight system for online streaming 3D reconstruction. First, OSM-prior-driven geometric construction uses OpenStreetMap semantic topology to directly generate a metric-consistent TSDF, replacing blind geometric search with deterministic mapping and avoiding costly optimization. Second, geometry-aware dynamic filtering employs a quad-modal constraint field (normal/height/depth consistency) to reject moving vehicles and transient occlusions in real time. Third, illumination-robust fusion in CIELAB decouples luminance and chromaticity via adaptive L-channel weighting and depth-gradient suppression, reducing seams under abrupt lighting changes. ParkingTwin runs at 30+ FPS on an entry-level GTX 1660. On a 68,000 m^2 real-world dataset, it achieves SSIM 0.87 (+16.0%), delivers about 15x end-to-end speedup, and reduces GPU memory by 83.3% compared with state-of-the-art 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) that typically requires high-end GPUs (RTX 4090D). The system outputs explicit triangle meshes compatible with Unity/Unreal digital-twin pipelines. Project page: https://mihoutao-liu.github.io/ParkingTwin/
tldr: The paper introduces ParkingTwin, a training-free, real-time 3D reconstruction system for generating high-fidelity parking lot digital twins using OSM priors and geometry-aware dynamic filtering, achieving significant speedup and memory reduction compared to 3D Gaussian Splatting.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了ParkingTwin，一个无需训练、实时的3D重建系统，利用OSM先验和几何感知的动态过滤，生成高保真停车场数字孪生模型，与3D高斯溅射相比，实现了显著的加速和内存减少。
summary_zh: 高保真停车场数字孪生为自动代客泊车 (AVP) 中的路径规划、碰撞检测和感知验证提供了重要的先验信息。然而，面向机器人的重建面临一个三难困境：稀疏的前向视角导致微弱的视差和病态几何；动态遮挡和极端光照阻碍了稳定的纹理融合；神经渲染通常需要昂贵的离线优化，违反了边缘侧流式传输的约束。我们提出 ParkingTwin，一个免训练、轻量级的在线流式 3D 重建系统。首先，基于 OSM 先验的几何构建利用 OpenStreetMap 语义拓扑直接生成度量一致的 TSDF，用确定性映射取代盲目几何搜索并避免了昂贵的优化。其次，几何感知动态滤波采用四模态约束场（法线/高度/深度一致性）来实时拒绝移动车辆和瞬态遮挡。第三，CIELAB 中的光照鲁棒融合通过自适应 L 通道加权和深度梯度抑制来解耦亮度和色度，减少了突变光照变化下的接缝。ParkingTwin 在入门级 GTX 1660 上以 30+ FPS 的速度运行。在一个 68,000 平方米的真实世界数据集上，它实现了 0.87 的 SSIM（+16.0%），提供了约 15 倍的端到端加速，并与通常需要高端 GPU（RTX 4090D）的最先进 3D 高斯溅射 (3DGS) 相比，减少了 83.3% 的 GPU 内存。该系统输出与 Unity/Unreal 数字孪生管线兼容的显式三角形网格。项目页面：https://mihoutao-liu.github.io/ParkingTwin/

title: Verifying Local Robustness of Pruned Safety-Critical Networks
summary: Formal verification of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) is essential for safety-critical applications, ranging from surgical robotics to NASA JPL autonomous systems. However, the computational cost of verifying large-scale models remains a significant barrier to adoption. This paper investigates the impact of pruning on formal local robustness certificates with different ratios. Using the state-of-the-art $α,β$-CROWN verifier, we evaluate ResNet4 models across varying pruning ratios on MNIST and, more importantly, on the NASA JPL Mars Frost Identification datasets. Our findings demonstrate a non-linear relationship: light pruning (40%) in MNIST and heavy pruning (70%-90%) in JPL improve verifiability, allowing models to outperform unpruned baselines in proven $L_\infty$ robustness properties. This suggests that reduced connectivity simplifies the search space for formal solvers and that the optimal pruning ratio varies significantly between datasets. This research highlights the complex nature of model compression, offering critical insights into selecting the optimal pruning ratio for deploying efficient, yet formally verified, DNNs in high-stakes environments where reliability is non-negotiable.
tldr: This paper investigates the relationship between pruning ratios and formal local robustness of DNNs, finding that specific pruning levels can improve verifiability and robustness for safety-critical applications like surgical robotics and autonomous systems, especially in datasets like NASA JPL Mars Frost Identification.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了剪枝率与深度神经网络局部鲁棒性之间的关系，发现特定的剪枝水平可以提高安全关键应用（如外科手术机器人和自主系统）的可验证性和鲁棒性，特别是在 NASA JPL 火星霜冻识别数据集上。
summary_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）的形式化验证对于安全攸关型应用至关重要，这些应用范围涵盖外科机器人到美国宇航局喷气推进实验室（NASA JPL）的自主系统。然而，验证大规模模型的计算成本仍然是阻碍其应用的重要障碍。本文研究了不同剪枝比例对形式化局部鲁棒性证书的影响。我们使用最先进的$α,β$-CROWN验证器，在MNIST以及更重要的美国宇航局喷气推进实验室火星霜冻识别数据集上，评估了不同剪枝比例下的ResNet4模型。我们的研究结果表明存在非线性关系：在MNIST中进行轻度剪枝（40%），以及在JPL中进行重度剪枝（70%-90%），都可以提高可验证性，使模型在经验证的$L_\infty$鲁棒性方面优于未剪枝的基线模型。这表明，降低连接性简化了形式化求解器的搜索空间，并且最佳剪枝比例在不同数据集之间差异显著。这项研究突出了模型压缩的复杂性，为在可靠性至关重要的高风险环境中部署高效且经过形式化验证的DNN选择最佳剪枝比例提供了重要见解。

title: RIM Hand : A Robotic Hand with an Accurate Carpometacarpal Joint and Nitinol-Supported Skeletal Structure
summary: This paper presents the flexible RIM Hand, a biomimetic robotic hand that precisely replicates the carpometacarpal (CMC) joints and employs superelastic Nitinol wires throughout its skeletal framework. By modeling the full carpal-to-metacarpal anatomy, the design enables realistic palm deformation through tendon-driven fingers while enhancing joint restoration and supports skeletal structure with Nitinol-based dorsal extensors. A flexible silicone skin further increases contact friction and contact area, enabling stable grasps for diverse objects. Experiments show that the palm can deform up to 28%, matching human hand flexibility, while achieving more than twice the payload capacity and three times the contact area compared to a rigid palm design. The RIM Hand thus offers improved dexterity, compliance, and anthropomorphism, making it promising for prosthetic and service-robot applications.
tldr: The paper introduces the RIM Hand, a novel robotic hand with biomimetic carpometacarpal joints and a Nitinol-supported structure, demonstrating enhanced dexterity, compliance, and anthropomorphism compared to rigid designs.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种新型机器人手 RIM Hand，它具有仿生腕掌关节和镍钛诺支撑结构，与刚性设计相比，具有更高的灵活性、顺应性和拟人化特性。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种灵活的RIM手，这是一种仿生机器人手，它精确地复制了腕掌（CMC）关节，并在其骨骼框架中通篇采用了超弹性镍钛诺丝。通过对完整的腕掌到掌骨解剖结构的建模，该设计能够通过肌腱驱动的手指实现逼真的手掌变形，同时增强关节复位，并利用基于镍钛诺的背侧伸肌支撑骨骼结构。 灵活的硅胶皮肤进一步增加了接触摩擦和接触面积，从而能够稳定地抓握各种物体。实验表明，该手掌可以变形高达28%，与人手灵活性相匹配，同时与刚性手掌设计相比，有效载荷能力提高了两倍以上，接触面积增加了三倍。因此，RIM手提供了更高的灵活性、顺应性和拟人性，使其在假肢和服务机器人应用中具有广阔前景。

title: Two-Stream temporal transformer for video action classification
summary: Motion representation plays an important role in video understanding and has many applications including action recognition, robot and autonomous guidance or others. Lately, transformer networks, through their self-attention mechanism capabilities, have proved their efficiency in many applications. In this study, we introduce a new two-stream transformer video classifier, which extracts spatio-temporal information from content and optical flow representing movement information. The proposed model identifies self-attention features across the joint optical flow and temporal frame domain and represents their relationships within the transformer encoder mechanism. The experimental results show that our proposed methodology provides excellent classification results on three well-known video datasets of human activities.
tldr: This paper introduces a two-stream temporal transformer model for video action classification, utilizing both visual content and optical flow to achieve excellent results on standard human activity datasets.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个双流时间Transformer模型，用于视频行为分类，利用视觉内容和光流在标准人类活动数据集上实现了出色的结果。
summary_zh: 运动表征在视频理解中扮演着重要角色，并具有诸多应用，包括动作识别、机器人和自动驾驶引导等。近年来，Transformer网络凭借其自注意力机制的能力，已在许多应用中证明了其效率。在本研究中，我们提出了一种新的双流Transformer视频分类器，该分类器从内容和代表运动信息的光流中提取时空信息。所提出的模型识别联合光流和时序帧域中的自注意力特征，并在Transformer编码器机制中表示它们的关系。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在三个著名的人类活动视频数据集上提供了出色的分类结果。

title: Unsupervised Video Class-Incremental Learning via Deep Embedded Clustering Management
summary: Unsupervised video class incremental learning (uVCIL) represents an important learning paradigm for learning video information without forgetting, and without considering any data labels. Prior approaches have focused on supervised class-incremental learning, relying on using the knowledge of labels and task boundaries, which is costly, requires human annotation, or is simply not a realistic option. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective approach to address the uVCIL. We first consider a deep feature extractor network, providing a set of representative video features during each task without assuming any class or task information. We then progressively build a series of deep clusters from the extracted features. During the successive task learning, the model updated from the previous task is used as an initial state in order to transfer knowledge to the current learning task. We perform in-depth evaluations on three standard video action recognition datasets, including UCF101, HMDB51, and Something-to-Something V2, by ignoring the labels from the supervised setting. Our approach significantly outperforms other baselines on all datasets.
tldr: This paper introduces an unsupervised class-incremental learning approach for video analysis using deep embedded clustering, achieving state-of-the-art results on standard video action recognition datasets.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于视频分析的无监督类增量学习方法，该方法使用深度嵌入聚类，并在标准视频动作识别数据集上取得了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 无监督视频类增量学习（uVCIL）是一种重要的学习范式，用于学习视频信息且不发生遗忘，也不考虑任何数据标签。先前的研究主要集中在有监督类增量学习，依赖于标签和任务边界的知识，这既昂贵又需要人工标注，或者根本就不是一个现实的选择。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法来解决uVCIL问题。我们首先考虑一个深度特征提取器网络，在每个任务期间提供一组具有代表性的视频特征，而不假设任何类或任务信息。然后，我们从提取的特征中逐步构建一系列深度聚类。在连续的任务学习过程中，使用从先前任务更新的模型作为初始状态，以便将知识迁移到当前学习任务。我们通过忽略有监督设置中的标签，在三个标准的视频动作识别数据集（包括UCF101、HMDB51和Something-to-Something V2）上进行了深入评估。我们的方法在所有数据集上均显著优于其他基线方法。

title: Numina-Lean-Agent: An Open and General Agentic Reasoning System for Formal Mathematics
summary: Agentic systems have recently become the dominant paradigm for formal theorem proving, achieving strong performance by coordinating multiple models and tools. However, existing approaches often rely on task-specific pipelines and trained formal provers, limiting their flexibility and reproducibility. In this paper, we propose the paradigm that directly uses a general coding agent as a formal math reasoner. This paradigm is motivated by (1) A general coding agent provides a natural interface for diverse reasoning tasks beyond proving, (2) Performance can be improved by simply replacing the underlying base model, without training, and (3) MCP enables flexible extension and autonomous calling of specialized tools, avoiding complex design. Based on this paradigm, we introduce Numina-Lean-Agent, which combines Claude Code with Numina-Lean-MCP to enable autonomous interaction with Lean, retrieval of relevant theorems, informal proving and auxiliary reasoning tools. Using Claude Opus 4.5 as the base model, Numina-Lean-Agent solves all problems in Putnam 2025 (12 / 12), matching the best closed-source system. Beyond benchmark evaluation, we further demonstrate its generality by interacting with mathematicians to successfully formalize the Brascamp-Lieb theorem. We release Numina-Lean-Agent and all solutions at https://github.com/project-numina/numina-lean-agent.
tldr: The paper introduces Numina-Lean-Agent, a general coding agent for formal mathematics reasoning, achieving strong performance on theorem proving and formalization tasks using a large language model and tool orchestration without task-specific training. It demonstrates this on Putnam problems and formalizing the Brascamp-Lieb theorem.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Numina-Lean-Agent，一个用于形式化数学推理的通用编码智能体。它通过使用大型语言模型和工具编排，在定理证明和形式化任务上取得了优异的性能, 无需特定任务的训练。在Putnam问题和Brascamp-Lieb定理的形式化上进行了演示。
summary_zh: 主体系统最近已成为形式化定理证明的主导范式，通过协调多个模型和工具实现了强大的性能。然而，现有方法通常依赖于特定于任务的流水线和训练过的形式化证明器，限制了其灵活性和可重复性。在本文中，我们提出了一种范式，该范式直接使用通用编码代理作为形式化数学推理器。这种范式的动机是：（1）通用编码代理为证明之外的各种推理任务提供了一个自然的接口；（2）可以通过简单地替换底层基础模型来提高性能，而无需训练；（3）MCP (模型控制程序) 能够灵活扩展和自主调用专门工具，避免了复杂的设计。基于这种范式，我们推出了Numina-Lean-Agent，它结合了 Claude Code 和 Numina-Lean-MCP，从而能够与 Lean 进行自主交互，检索相关定理，进行非形式化证明以及调用辅助推理工具。使用 Claude Opus 4.5 作为基础模型，Numina-Lean-Agent 解决了 Putnam 2025 中的所有问题（12/12），与最佳闭源系统相匹配。除了基准评估之外，我们还通过与数学家互动成功地形式化了 Brascamp-Lieb 定理，进一步证明了它的通用性。我们将 Numina-Lean-Agent 和所有解决方案发布在 https://github.com/project-numina/numina-lean-agent 上。

title: Correcting and Quantifying Systematic Errors in 3D Box Annotations for Autonomous Driving
summary: Accurate ground truth annotations are critical to supervised learning and evaluating the performance of autonomous vehicle systems. These vehicles are typically equipped with active sensors, such as LiDAR, which scan the environment in predefined patterns. 3D box annotation based on data from such sensors is challenging in dynamic scenarios, where objects are observed at different timestamps, hence different positions. Without proper handling of this phenomenon, systematic errors are prone to being introduced in the box annotations. Our work is the first to discover such annotation errors in widely used, publicly available datasets. Through our novel offline estimation method, we correct the annotations so that they follow physically feasible trajectories and achieve spatial and temporal consistency with the sensor data. For the first time, we define metrics for this problem; and we evaluate our method on the Argoverse 2, MAN TruckScenes, and our proprietary datasets. Our approach increases the quality of box annotations by more than 17% in these datasets. Furthermore, we quantify the annotation errors in them and find that the original annotations are misplaced by up to 2.5 m, with highly dynamic objects being the most affected. Finally, we test the impact of the errors in benchmarking and find that the impact is larger than the improvements that state-of-the-art methods typically achieve with respect to the previous state-of-the-art methods; showing that accurate annotations are essential for correct interpretation of performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/alexandre-justo-miro/annotation-correction-3D-boxes.
tldr: This paper addresses the problem of systematic errors in 3D bounding box annotations in autonomous driving datasets, proposes a novel correction method achieving spatial-temporal consistency, and quantifies the impact of these errors on benchmarking.
tldr_zh: 本文解决了自动驾驶数据集中 3D 边界框标注的系统性误差问题，提出了一种实现时空一致性的新型校正方法，并量化了这些误差对基准测试的影响。
summary_zh: 准确的真值标注对于监督学习和评估自动驾驶车辆系统的性能至关重要。这些车辆通常配备有主动传感器，例如激光雷达，它以预定义的模式扫描环境。基于此类传感器数据的3D框标注在动态场景中极具挑战性，因为物体在不同的时间戳被观测到，因此位置也不同。如果不正确处理这种现象，系统性误差很容易被引入到框标注中。我们的工作首次发现了广泛使用的、公开可用的数据集中的此类标注错误。通过我们新颖的离线估计方法，我们修正了标注，使其遵循物理上可行的轨迹，并实现与传感器数据在空间和时间上的一致性。我们首次为此问题定义了指标；并在Argoverse 2、MAN TruckScenes和我们专有的数据集上评估了我们的方法。我们的方法在这些数据集中将框标注的质量提高了17%以上。此外，我们量化了其中的标注错误，并发现原始标注错位高达2.5米，其中动态性高的物体受影响最大。最后，我们测试了这些错误对基准测试的影响，并发现其影响大于最先进的方法相对于先前最先进的方法通常所取得的改进；表明准确的标注对于正确解释性能至关重要。我们的代码可在https://github.com/alexandre-justo-miro/annotation-correction-3D-boxes上获得。

title: Leveraging Transformer Decoder for Automotive Radar Object Detection
summary: In this paper, we present a Transformer-based architecture for 3D radar object detection that uses a novel Transformer Decoder as the prediction head to directly regress 3D bounding boxes and class scores from radar feature representations. To bridge multi-scale radar features and the decoder, we propose Pyramid Token Fusion (PTF), a lightweight module that converts a feature pyramid into a unified, scale-aware token sequence. By formulating detection as a set prediction problem with learnable object queries and positional encodings, our design models long-range spatial-temporal correlations and cross-feature interactions. This approach eliminates dense proposal generation and heuristic post-processing such as extensive non-maximum suppression (NMS) tuning. We evaluate the proposed framework on the RADDet, where it achieves significant improvements over state-of-the-art radar-only baselines.
tldr: This paper introduces a Transformer-based architecture for 3D radar object detection, utilizing a novel Transformer Decoder and Pyramid Token Fusion to improve performance on the RADDet dataset and eliminate the need for extensive post-processing.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于 Transformer 的 3D 雷达目标检测架构，它使用了一种新颖的 Transformer 解码器和金字塔令牌融合来提高 RADDet 数据集上的性能，并消除了对大量后处理的需求。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的3D雷达目标检测架构，该架构使用一种新型的Transformer解码器作为预测头，直接从雷达特征表示回归3D边界框和类别得分。为了连接多尺度雷达特征和解码器，我们提出了一种轻量级的模块——金字塔Token融合(PTF)，它将特征金字塔转换为统一的、尺度感知的Token序列。通过将检测问题表述为具有可学习对象查询和位置编码的集合预测问题，我们的设计可以建模远距离时空相关性和跨特征交互。这种方法消除了密集提案生成和启发式后处理，例如广泛的非极大值抑制（NMS）调优。我们在RADDet数据集上评估了所提出的框架，结果表明，该框架相对于最新的纯雷达基线方法取得了显著的改进。

title: A Lightweight Model-Driven 4D Radar Framework for Pervasive Human Detection in Harsh Conditions
summary: Pervasive sensing in industrial and underground environments is severely constrained by airborne dust, smoke, confined geometry, and metallic structures, which rapidly degrade optical and LiDAR based perception. Elevation resolved 4D mmWave radar offers strong resilience to such conditions, yet there remains a limited understanding of how to process its sparse and anisotropic point clouds for reliable human detection in enclosed, visibility degraded spaces. This paper presents a fully model-driven 4D radar perception framework designed for real-time execution on embedded edge hardware. The system uses radar as its sole perception modality and integrates domain aware multi threshold filtering, ego motion compensated temporal accumulation, KD tree Euclidean clustering with Doppler aware refinement, and a rule based 3D classifier. The framework is evaluated in a dust filled enclosed trailer and in real underground mining tunnels, and in the tested scenarios the radar based detector maintains stable pedestrian identification as camera and LiDAR modalities fail under severe visibility degradation. These results suggest that the proposed model-driven approach provides robust, interpretable, and computationally efficient perception for safety-critical applications in harsh industrial and subterranean environments.
tldr: This paper presents a model-driven 4D radar perception framework for human detection in harsh industrial and underground environments, demonstrating robustness where optical and LiDAR sensors fail. It focuses on environments with poor visibility.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种模型驱动的4D雷达感知框架，用于在恶劣的工业和地下环境中进行人体检测。该框架在光学和激光雷达传感器失效的情况下，展示了其稳健性。主要关注低能见度环境。
summary_zh: 工业和地下环境中普遍存在的感知技术受到空气中的灰尘、烟雾、狭窄空间和金属结构的严重限制，这些因素会迅速降低基于光学和激光雷达的感知能力。高程分辨的4D毫米波雷达对此类环境具有很强的适应性，但对于如何处理其稀疏和各向异性的点云，以在封闭且能见度差的空间中进行可靠的人体检测，仍缺乏深入的理解。本文提出了一种完全模型驱动的4D雷达感知框架，旨在嵌入式边缘硬件上实时执行。该系统仅使用雷达作为其唯一的感知模式，并集成了领域感知的多阈值滤波、自运动补偿的时间累积、利用多普勒信息进行细化的KD树欧几里得聚类，以及基于规则的3D分类器。该框架在充满灰尘的封闭拖车以及真实的地下矿井隧道中进行了评估。在测试场景中，当相机和激光雷达在严重能见度下降的情况下失效时，基于雷达的检测器仍能保持稳定的人员识别。这些结果表明，所提出的模型驱动方法为恶劣工业和地下环境中安全关键应用提供了稳健、可解释且计算高效的感知能力。

title: Real-Time 4D Radar Perception for Robust Human Detection in Harsh Enclosed Environments
summary: This paper introduces a novel methodology for generating controlled, multi-level dust concentrations in a highly cluttered environment representative of harsh, enclosed environments, such as underground mines, road tunnels, or collapsed buildings, enabling repeatable mm-wave propagation studies under severe electromagnetic constraints. We also present a new 4D mmWave radar dataset, augmented by camera and LiDAR, illustrating how dust particles and reflective surfaces jointly impact the sensing functionality. To address these challenges, we develop a threshold-based noise filtering framework leveraging key radar parameters (RCS, velocity, azimuth, elevation) to suppress ghost targets and mitigate strong multipath reflections at the raw data level. Building on the filtered point clouds, a cluster-level, rule-based classification pipeline exploits radar semantics-velocity, RCS, and volumetric spread-to achieve reliable, real-time pedestrian detection without extensive domainspecific training. Experimental results confirm that this integrated approach significantly enhances clutter mitigation, detection robustness, and overall system resilience in dust-laden mining environments.
tldr: The paper introduces a novel 4D radar dataset and a real-time pedestrian detection pipeline robust to harsh, dust-laden environments by filtering noise and leveraging radar semantics.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的4D雷达数据集和一个实时的行人检测流程，该流程通过过滤噪声并利用雷达语义，在恶劣的粉尘环境中具有很强的鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的方法，用于在高度杂乱的环境中生成可控的多层级灰尘浓度，该环境具有代表性恶劣的封闭环境，例如地下矿井、公路隧道或倒塌的建筑物，从而能够在严苛的电磁约束下进行可重复的毫米波传播研究。我们还提出了一个新的4D毫米波雷达数据集，它由相机和激光雷达增强，展示了灰尘颗粒和反射表面如何共同影响传感功能。为了应对这些挑战，我们开发了一种基于阈值的噪声过滤框架，该框架利用关键雷达参数（RCS、速度、方位角、仰角）来抑制幽灵目标，并在原始数据层面上减轻强多径反射。在过滤后的点云基础上，一个基于聚类级别、基于规则的分类流水线利用雷达语义信息——速度、RCS和体积扩散——来实现可靠的、实时的行人检测，而无需进行广泛的特定领域训练。实验结果证实，这种集成方法显著增强了在含尘矿业环境中杂波抑制、检测鲁棒性和整体系统弹性。

title: Inverting Self-Organizing Maps: A Unified Activation-Based Framework
summary: Self-Organizing Maps provide topology-preserving projections of high-dimensional data and have been widely used for visualization, clustering, and vector quantization. In this work, we show that the activation pattern of a SOM - the squared distances to its prototypes - can be inverted to recover the exact input under mild geometric conditions. This follows from a classical fact in Euclidean distance geometry: a point in $D$ dimensions is uniquely determined by its distances to $D{+}1$ affinely independent references. We derive the corresponding linear system and characterize the conditions under which the inversion is well-posed. Building upon this mechanism, we introduce the Manifold-Aware Unified SOM Inversion and Control (MUSIC) update rule, which enables controlled, semantically meaningful trajectories in latent space. MUSIC modifies squared distances to selected prototypes while preserving others, resulting in a deterministic geometric flow aligned with the SOM's piecewise-linear structure. Tikhonov regularization stabilizes the update rule and ensures smooth motion on high-dimensional datasets. Unlike variational or probabilistic generative models, MUSIC does not rely on sampling, latent priors, or encoder-decoder architectures. If no perturbation is applied, inversion recovers the exact input; when a target cluster or prototype is specified, MUSIC produces coherent semantic variations while remaining on the data manifold. This leads to a new perspective on data augmentation and controllable latent exploration based solely on prototype geometry. We validate the approach using synthetic Gaussian mixtures, the MNIST and the Faces in the Wild dataset. Across all settings, MUSIC produces smooth, interpretable trajectories that reveal the underlying geometry of the learned manifold, illustrating the advantages of SOM-based inversion over unsupervised clustering.
tldr: This paper introduces a method called MUSIC for inverting Self-Organizing Maps (SOMs) to enable controlled exploration and manipulation of the latent space for tasks like data augmentation and semantic variation, offering an alternative to generative models.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为MUSIC的方法，用于反转自组织映射(SOM)，以实现对潜在空间的可控探索和操作，适用于数据增强和语义变异等任务，并提供了一种替代生成模型的方法。
summary_zh: 自组织映射提供了高维数据的拓扑保持投影，并已被广泛用于可视化、聚类和向量量化。本文中，我们表明SOM的激活模式（即到其原型向量的平方距离）可以在温和的几何条件下被反演，以恢复精确的输入。这源于欧几里得距离几何中的一个经典事实：一个D维空间中的点可以由其到D+1个仿射独立参考点的距离唯一确定。我们推导出了相应的线性系统，并描述了反演适定的条件。在此机制的基础上，我们引入了流形感知统一SOM反演与控制(MUSIC)更新规则，该规则能够在潜在空间中实现可控的、语义上有意义的轨迹。MUSIC修改到选定原型向量的平方距离，同时保持其他距离不变，从而产生与SOM的分段线性结构对齐的确定性几何流。Tikhonov正则化稳定了更新规则，并确保了在高维数据集上的平滑运动。与变分或概率生成模型不同，MUSIC不依赖于采样、潜在先验或编码器-解码器架构。如果没有施加任何扰动，反演将恢复精确的输入；当指定目标聚类或原型向量时，MUSIC会产生一致的语义变异，同时保持在数据流形上。这引出了一种基于原型向量几何的数据增强和可控潜在空间探索的新视角。我们使用合成高斯混合模型、MNIST数据集和Faces in the Wild数据集来验证该方法。在所有设置中，MUSIC都能产生平滑、可解释的轨迹，从而揭示所学习流形的底层几何结构，说明了基于SOM的反演相对于无监督聚类的优势。

title: Autoregressive deep learning for real-time simulation of soft tissue dynamics during virtual neurosurgery
summary: Accurate simulation of brain deformation is a key component for developing realistic, interactive neurosurgical simulators, as complex nonlinear deformations must be captured to ensure realistic tool-tissue interactions. However, traditional numerical solvers often fall short in meeting real-time performance requirements. To overcome this, we introduce a deep learning-based surrogate model that efficiently simulates transient brain deformation caused by continuous interactions between surgical instruments and the virtual brain geometry. Building on Universal Physics Transformers, our approach operates directly on large-scale mesh data and is trained on an extensive dataset generated from nonlinear finite element simulations, covering a broad spectrum of temporal instrument-tissue interaction scenarios. To reduce the accumulation of errors in autoregressive inference, we propose a stochastic teacher forcing strategy applied during model training. Specifically, training consists of short stochastic rollouts in which the proportion of ground truth inputs is gradually decreased in favor of model-generated predictions. Our results show that the proposed surrogate model achieves accurate and efficient predictions across a range of transient brain deformation scenarios, scaling to meshes with up to 150,000 nodes. The introduced stochastic teacher forcing technique substantially improves long-term rollout stability, reducing the maximum prediction error from 6.7 mm to 3.5 mm. We further integrate the trained surrogate model into an interactive neurosurgical simulation environment, achieving runtimes below 10 ms per simulation step on consumer-grade inference hardware. Our proposed deep learning framework enables rapid, smooth and accurate biomechanical simulations of dynamic brain tissue deformation, laying the foundation for realistic surgical training environments.
tldr: This paper introduces a deep learning-based surrogate model utilizing Universal Physics Transformers and stochastic teacher forcing for real-time simulation of brain deformation during virtual neurosurgery, achieving significant improvements in accuracy and speed on large-scale meshes compared to traditional methods.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于深度学习的替代模型，该模型利用通用物理转换器和随机教师强制方法来实时模拟虚拟神经外科中的脑部变形。与传统方法相比，该模型在大规模网格上实现了精度和速度的显著提高。
summary_zh: 脑变形的精确模拟是开发逼真、交互式神经外科模拟器的关键组成部分，因为必须捕捉到复杂的非线性变形，以确保逼真的工具-组织交互。然而，传统的数值求解器通常无法满足实时性能要求。为了克服这个问题，我们引入了一种基于深度学习的代理模型，它可以有效地模拟由手术器械和虚拟脑几何体之间的连续交互引起的瞬态脑变形。基于通用物理Transformer，我们的方法直接在大规模网格数据上运行，并使用从非线性有限元模拟生成的大量数据集进行训练，涵盖了广泛的时间仪器-组织交互情景。为了减少自回归推理中的误差累积，我们提出了一种应用于模型训练的随机教师强制策略。具体而言，训练包括短期的随机展开，其中真实输入数据的比例逐渐降低，而模型生成的预测数据的比例则逐渐增加。我们的结果表明，所提出的代理模型在一系列瞬态脑变形情景中实现了准确而有效的预测，并可扩展到具有高达15万个节点的网格。引入的随机教师强制技术显著提高了长期展开的稳定性，将最大预测误差从6.7毫米降低到3.5毫米。我们进一步将训练好的代理模型集成到一个交互式神经外科模拟环境中，在消费级推理硬件上实现了每个模拟步骤低于10毫秒的运行时间。我们提出的深度学习框架能够实现动态脑组织变形的快速、平滑和准确的生物力学模拟，为逼真的手术培训环境奠定了基础。

title: Sample Complexity of Average-Reward Q-Learning: From Single-agent to Federated Reinforcement Learning
summary: Average-reward reinforcement learning offers a principled framework for long-term decision-making by maximizing the mean reward per time step. Although Q-learning is a widely used model-free algorithm with established sample complexity in discounted and finite-horizon Markov decision processes (MDPs), its theoretical guarantees for average-reward settings remain limited. This work studies a simple but effective Q-learning algorithm for average-reward MDPs with finite state and action spaces under the weakly communicating assumption, covering both single-agent and federated scenarios. For the single-agent case, we show that Q-learning with carefully chosen parameters achieves sample complexity $\widetilde{O}\left(\frac{|\mathcal{S}||\mathcal{A}|\|h^{\star}\|_{\mathsf{sp}}^3}{\varepsilon^3}\right)$, where $\|h^{\star}\|_{\mathsf{sp}}$ is the span norm of the bias function, improving previous results by at least a factor of $\frac{\|h^{\star}\|_{\mathsf{sp}}^2}{\varepsilon^2}$. In the federated setting with $M$ agents, we prove that collaboration reduces the per-agent sample complexity to $\widetilde{O}\left(\frac{|\mathcal{S}||\mathcal{A}|\|h^{\star}\|_{\mathsf{sp}}^3}{M\varepsilon^3}\right)$, with only $\widetilde{O}\left(\frac{\|h^{\star}\|_{\mathsf{sp}}}{\varepsilon}\right)$ communication rounds required. These results establish the first federated Q-learning algorithm for average-reward MDPs, with provable efficiency in both sample and communication complexity.
tldr: This paper presents a Q-learning algorithm for average-reward Markov Decision Processes (MDPs), deriving improved sample complexity bounds for both single-agent and federated settings while providing provable communication efficiency for the federated case.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于平均奖励马尔可夫决策过程（MDPs）的Q-learning算法，推导了单智能体和联邦场景下改进的样本复杂度界限，并为联邦场景提供了可证明的通信效率。
summary_zh: 平均回报强化学习通过最大化每个时间步的平均回报，提供了一个长期决策的原则性框架。尽管Q-学习是一种广泛使用的无模型算法，在折扣和有限视界马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）中具有已建立的样本复杂度，但其在平均回报设定下的理论保证仍然有限。本研究探讨了一种简单但有效的Q-学习算法，用于具有有限状态和动作空间的平均回报MDP，并在弱连通假设下，涵盖单智能体和联邦场景。对于单智能体情况，我们证明了具有精心选择的参数的Q-学习实现了$\widetilde{O}\left(\frac{|\mathcal{S}||\mathcal{A}|\|h^{\star}\|_{\mathsf{sp}}^3}{\varepsilon^3}\right)$的样本复杂度，其中$\|h^{\star}\|_{\mathsf{sp}}$是偏差函数的跨度范数，相较于之前的研究成果，至少改进了$\frac{\|h^{\star}\|_{\mathsf{sp}}^2}{\varepsilon^2}$倍。在具有$M$个智能体的联邦设定下，我们证明协作将每个智能体的样本复杂度降低到$\widetilde{O}\left(\frac{|\mathcal{S}||\mathcal{A}|\|h^{\star}\|_{\mathsf{sp}}^3}{M\varepsilon^3}\right)$，并且仅需要$\widetilde{O}\left(\frac{\|h^{\star}\|_{\mathsf{sp}}}{\varepsilon}\right)$轮通信。这些结果建立了第一个用于平均回报MDP的联邦Q-学习算法，在样本和通信复杂度方面都具有可证明的效率。

title: Federated Learning Under Temporal Drift -- Mitigating Catastrophic Forgetting via Experience Replay
summary: Federated Learning struggles under temporal concept drift where client data distributions shift over time. We demonstrate that standard FedAvg suffers catastrophic forgetting under seasonal drift on Fashion-MNIST, with accuracy dropping from 74% to 28%. We propose client-side experience replay, where each client maintains a small buffer of past samples mixed with current data during local training. This simple approach requires no changes to server aggregation. Experiments show that a 50-sample-per-class buffer restores performance to 78-82%, effectively preventing forgetting. Our ablation study reveals a clear memory-accuracy trade-off as buffer size increases.
tldr: This paper addresses catastrophic forgetting in Federated Learning under temporal drift by using client-side experience replay (mixing past data with current data during local training), demonstrating improved performance on Fashion-MNIST.
tldr_zh: 本文通过在客户端使用经验回放（在本地训练期间将过去的数据与当前数据混合）来解决联邦学习中时间漂移下的灾难性遗忘问题，并在Fashion-MNIST上展示了性能的提升。
summary_zh: 联邦学习在时间概念漂移下表现不佳，即客户端数据分布随时间变化。我们证明了标准FedAvg在Fashion-MNIST的季节性漂移下会遭受灾难性遗忘，准确率从74%下降到28%。我们提出一种客户端经验回放方法，即每个客户端维护一个小的过去样本缓冲区，在本地训练期间与当前数据混合。这种简单的方法不需要更改服务器聚合。实验表明，一个每类别50个样本的缓冲区可以将性能恢复到78-82%，有效防止遗忘。我们的消融研究揭示了随着缓冲区大小增加而产生的清晰的内存-准确率权衡。

title: GuideTouch: An Obstacle Avoidance Device with Tactile Feedback for Visually Impaired
summary: Safe navigation for the visually impaired individuals remains a critical challenge, especially concerning head-level obstacles, which traditional mobility aids often fail to detect. We introduce GuideTouch, a compact, affordable, standalone wearable device designed for autonomous obstacle avoidance. The system integrates two vertically aligned Time-of-Flight (ToF) sensors, enabling three-dimensional environmental perception, and four vibrotactile actuators that provide directional haptic feedback. Proximity and direction information is communicated via an intuitive 4-point vibrotactile feedback system located across the user's shoulders and upper chest. For real-world robustness, the device includes a unique centrifugal self-cleaning optical cover mechanism and a sound alarm system for location if the device is dropped. We evaluated the haptic perception accuracy across 22 participants (17 male and 5 female, aged 21-48, mean 25.7, sd 6.1). Statistical analysis confirmed a significant difference between the perception accuracy of different patterns. The system demonstrated high recognition accuracy, achieving an average of 92.9% for single and double motor (primary directional) patterns. Furthermore, preliminary experiments with 14 visually impaired users validated this interface, showing a recognition accuracy of 93.75% for primary directional cues. The results demonstrate that GuideTouch enables intuitive spatial perception and could significantly improve the safety, confidence, and autonomy of users with visual impairments during independent navigation.
tldr: The paper introduces GuideTouch, a wearable device that uses ToF sensors and vibrotactile feedback to help visually impaired individuals avoid head-level obstacles, achieving high recognition accuracy in user studies.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为GuideTouch的可穿戴设备，它使用飞行时间传感器和触觉反馈来帮助视障人士避开头部高度的障碍物，并在用户研究中实现了较高的识别准确率。
summary_zh: 为视障人士提供安全导航仍然是一项关键挑战，特别是对于头部高度的障碍物，而传统的出行辅助工具常常无法检测到这些障碍物。我们推出GuideTouch，一个紧凑、经济、独立的穿戴式设备，旨在实现自主避障。该系统集成了两个垂直排列的飞行时间（ToF）传感器，可实现三维环境感知，以及四个振动触觉执行器，提供定向触觉反馈。接近度和方向信息通过位于用户肩膀和上胸部的直观的四点振动触觉反馈系统进行传达。为了在现实世界中具有鲁棒性，该设备包括一个独特的离心式自清洁光学盖机制和一个用于定位的声报警系统（如果设备掉落）。我们评估了22名参与者（17名男性和5名女性，年龄21-48岁，平均25.7岁，标准差6.1）的触觉感知准确度。统计分析证实，不同模式的感知准确度之间存在显著差异。该系统表现出较高的识别准确率，单电机和双电机（主要方向）模式的平均准确率达到92.9%。此外，与14名视障用户的初步实验验证了该界面，主要方向提示的识别准确率达到93.75%。结果表明，GuideTouch能够实现直观的空间感知，并能显著提高视障用户在独立导航过程中的安全性、自信心和自主性。

title: Learning-Augmented Online TRP on a Line
summary: We study the online traveling repairperson problem on a line within the recently proposed learning-augmented framework, which provides predictions on the requests to be served via machine learning. In the original model (with no predictions), there is a stream of requests released over time along the line. The goal is to minimize the sum (or average) of the completion times of the requests. In the original model, the state-of-the-art competitive ratio lower bound is $1+\sqrt{2} > 2.414$ for any deterministic algorithm and the state-of-the-art competitive ratio upper bound is 4 for a deterministic algorithm. Our prediction model involves predicted positions, possibly error-prone, of each request in the stream known a priori but the arrival times of requests are not known until their arrival. We first establish a 3-competitive lower bound which extends to the original model. We then design a deterministic algorithm that is $(2+\sqrt{3})\approx 3.732$-competitive when predictions are perfect. With imperfect predictions (maximum error $δ> 0$), we show that our deterministic algorithm becomes $\min\{3.732+4δ,4\}$-competitive, knowing $δ$. To the best of our knowledge, these are the first results for online traveling repairperson problem in the learning-augmented framework.
tldr: This paper explores the online traveling repairperson problem on a line using a learning-augmented framework, providing predicted request positions to improve performance. They present competitive ratio bounds and a deterministic algorithm.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了在线旅行维修人员问题，在学习增强框架下，使用预测的请求位置来提高性能。他们提出了竞争比率界限和一种确定性算法。
summary_zh: 我们研究了在线旅行维修员问题在线上的学习增强框架，它通过机器学习提供关于待服务请求的预测。在原始模型（无预测）中，存在一个沿线上随时间释放的请求流。目标是最小化请求的完成时间的总和（或平均值）。在原始模型中，对于任何确定性算法，最先进的竞争比下界是 $1+\sqrt{2} > 2.414$，最先进的确定性算法的竞争比上界是4。我们的预测模型涉及 Stream 中每个请求的预测位置，这些预测位置可能易出错，它们会在事先已知，但请求的到达时间在到达之前是未知的。我们首先建立了一个 3 竞争比下界，该下界可以扩展到原始模型。然后，我们设计了一种确定性算法，当预测完美时，其竞争比为 $(2+\sqrt{3})\approx 3.732$。对于不完美的预测（最大误差 $δ> 0$），我们证明我们的确定性算法变为 $\min\{3.732+4δ,4\}$-竞争的，前提是已知 $δ$。据我们所知，这些是在学习增强框架中在线旅行维修员问题的首批结果。

title: Robustness and Resilience Evaluation of Eco-Driving Strategies at Signalized Intersections
summary: Eco-driving strategies have demonstrated substantial potential for improving energy efficiency and reducing emissions, especially at signalized intersections. However, evaluations of eco-driving methods typically rely on simplified simulation or experimental conditions, where certain assumptions are made to manage complexity and experimental control. This study introduces a unified framework to evaluate eco-driving strategies through the lens of two complementary criteria: control robustness and environmental resilience. We define formal indicators that quantify performance degradation caused by internal execution variability and external environmental disturbances, respectively. These indicators are then applied to assess multiple eco-driving controllers through real-world vehicle experiments. The results reveal key tradeoffs between tracking accuracy and adaptability, showing that optimization-based controllers offer more consistent performance across varying disturbance levels, while analytical controllers may perform comparably under nominal conditions but exhibit greater sensitivity to execution and timing variability.
tldr: This paper introduces a framework to evaluate eco-driving strategies at signalized intersections, focusing on robustness to internal variability and resilience to external disturbances, assessed through real-world experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个评估信号交叉口节能驾驶策略的框架，重点关注对内部可变性的鲁棒性和对外部干扰的弹性，并通过真实车辆实验进行评估。
summary_zh: 生态驾驶策略已展现出改善能源效率和减少排放的巨大潜力，尤其是在信号交叉口。然而，对生态驾驶方法的评估通常依赖于简化的仿真或实验条件，在这些条件下会做出某些假设以管理复杂性和实验控制。本研究引入了一个统一的框架，通过控制鲁棒性和环境适应性这两个互补的标准来评估生态驾驶策略。我们定义了形式化的指标，分别量化由内部执行可变性和外部环境扰动引起的性能下降。然后，我们将这些指标应用于通过真实车辆实验评估多个生态驾驶控制器。结果揭示了跟踪精度和适应性之间的关键权衡，表明基于优化的控制器在不同的扰动水平下提供更一致的性能，而分析控制器在名义条件下可能表现相当，但在执行和时间可变性方面表现出更大的敏感性。

title: Discriminant Learning-based Colorspace for Blade Segmentation
summary: Suboptimal color representation often hinders accurate image segmentation, yet many modern algorithms neglect this critical preprocessing step. This work presents a novel multidimensional nonlinear discriminant analysis algorithm, Colorspace Discriminant Analysis (CSDA), for improved segmentation. Extending Linear Discriminant Analysis into a deep learning context, CSDA customizes color representation by maximizing multidimensional signed inter-class separability while minimizing intra-class variability through a generalized discriminative loss. To ensure stable training, we introduce three alternative losses that enable end-to-end optimization of both the discriminative colorspace and segmentation process. Experiments on wind turbine blade data demonstrate significant accuracy gains, emphasizing the importance of tailored preprocessing in domain-specific segmentation.
tldr: The paper introduces Colorspace Discriminant Analysis (CSDA), a deep learning approach to optimize color representation for improved image segmentation, demonstrating gains on wind turbine blade data.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种颜色空间判别分析（CSDA）方法，它是一种深度学习方法，旨在优化颜色表示以改进图像分割，并在风力涡轮机叶片数据上展示了增益。
summary_zh: 颜色表示的次优性常常阻碍图像分割的准确性，然而许多现代算法忽略了这个关键的预处理步骤。本文提出了一种新颖的多维非线性判别分析算法，即色彩空间判别分析(CSDA)，用于改进分割。CSDA将线性判别分析扩展到深度学习环境中，通过广义判别损失最大化多维带符号的类间可分性并最小化类内变异性，从而定制颜色表示。为了确保训练的稳定性，我们引入了三种替代损失函数，使得判别性色彩空间和分割过程能够进行端到端优化。在风力涡轮机叶片数据上的实验证明了显著的精度提升，强调了在特定领域分割中定制预处理的重要性。

title: GO-MLVTON: Garment Occlusion-Aware Multi-Layer Virtual Try-On with Diffusion Models
summary: Existing Image-based virtual try-on (VTON) methods primarily focus on single-layer or multi-garment VTON, neglecting multi-layer VTON (ML-VTON), which involves dressing multiple layers of garments onto the human body with realistic deformation and layering to generate visually plausible outcomes. The main challenge lies in accurately modeling occlusion relationships between inner and outer garments to reduce interference from redundant inner garment features. To address this, we propose GO-MLVTON, the first multi-layer VTON method, introducing the Garment Occlusion Learning module to learn occlusion relationships and the StableDiffusion-based Garment Morphing & Fitting module to deform and fit garments onto the human body, producing high-quality multi-layer try-on results. Additionally, we present the MLG dataset for this task and propose a new metric named Layered Appearance Coherence Difference (LACD) for evaluation. Extensive experiments demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of GO-MLVTON. Project page: https://upyuyang.github.io/go-mlvton/.
tldr: The paper introduces GO-MLVTON, a multi-layer virtual try-on method using diffusion models, addressing the challenge of garment occlusion and deformation, and includes a new dataset and evaluation metric.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了GO-MLVTON，一种使用扩散模型的多层虚拟试穿方法，解决了服装遮挡和变形的挑战，并包含一个新的数据集和评估指标。
summary_zh: 现有的基于图像的虚拟试穿（VTON）方法主要集中于单层或多服装VTON，而忽略了多层VTON (ML-VTON)，后者涉及将多层服装穿在人体上，并具有逼真的变形和分层效果，以生成视觉上合理的图像。主要的挑战在于准确建模内层和外层服装之间的遮挡关系，以减少冗余内层服装特征的干扰。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了GO-MLVTON，这是第一个多层VTON方法，引入了服装遮挡学习模块来学习遮挡关系，以及基于StableDiffusion的服装形变与拟合模块来将服装变形并拟合到人体上，从而产生高质量的多层试穿效果。此外，我们为该任务提出了MLG数据集，并提出了一种名为分层外观一致性差异 (LACD) 的新指标用于评估。大量的实验证明了GO-MLVTON的最先进性能。项目主页: https://upyuyang.github.io/go-mlvton/.

title: PAtt: A Pattern Attention Network for ETA Prediction Using Historical Speed Profiles
summary: In this paper, we propose an ETA model (Estimated Time of Arrival) that leverages an attention mechanism over historical road speed patterns. As autonomous driving and intelligent transportation systems become increasingly prevalent, the need for accurate and reliable ETA estimation has grown, playing a vital role in navigation, mobility planning, and traffic management. However, predicting ETA remains a challenging task due to the dynamic and complex nature of traffic flow. Traditional methods often combine real-time and historical traffic data in simplistic ways, or rely on complex rule-based computations. While recent deep learning models have shown potential, they often require high computational costs and do not effectively capture the spatio-temporal patterns crucial for ETA prediction. ETA prediction inherently involves spatio-temporal causality, and our proposed model addresses this by leveraging attention mechanisms to extract and utilize temporal features accumulated at each spatio-temporal point along a route. This architecture enables efficient and accurate ETA estimation while keeping the model lightweight and scalable. We validate our approach using real-world driving datasets and demonstrate that our approach outperforms existing baselines by effectively integrating road characteristics, real-time traffic conditions, and historical speed patterns in a task-aware manner.
tldr: The paper introduces PAtt, a pattern attention network for ETA prediction that leverages historical speed profiles and addresses the challenges of spatio-temporal causality while maintaining efficiency and scalability. It claims to outperform existing baselines by effectively integrating road characteristics, real-time traffic, and historical data.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为 PAtt 的模式注意力网络，用于 ETA 预测，该网络利用历史速度曲线，在保持效率和可扩展性的同时，解决了时空因果关系带来的挑战。 它声称通过有效整合道路特征、实时交通和历史数据，优于现有的基线。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种ETA（预计到达时间）模型，该模型利用注意力机制处理历史道路速度模式。随着自动驾驶和智能交通系统日益普及，对准确可靠的ETA估计需求不断增长，在导航、出行规划和交通管理中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，由于交通流的动态性和复杂性，预测ETA仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。传统方法通常以简单的方式结合实时和历史交通数据，或依赖于复杂的基于规则的计算。虽然最近的深度学习模型已经显示出潜力，但它们通常需要高计算成本，并且不能有效地捕捉对于ETA预测至关重要的时空模式。ETA预测本质上涉及时空因果关系，我们提出的模型通过利用注意力机制来提取和利用沿路线的每个时空点累积的时间特征来解决这个问题。该架构能够在保持模型轻量化和可扩展性的同时，实现高效准确的ETA估计。我们使用真实世界的驾驶数据集验证了我们的方法，并证明我们的方法通过以任务感知的方式有效地整合道路特征、实时交通状况和历史速度模式，从而优于现有的基线方法。

title: BladeSDF : Unconditional and Conditional Generative Modeling of Representative Blade Geometries Using Signed Distance Functions
summary: Generative AI has emerged as a transformative paradigm in engineering design, enabling automated synthesis and reconstruction of complex 3D geometries while preserving feasibility and performance relevance. This paper introduces a domain-specific implicit generative framework for turbine blade geometry using DeepSDF, addressing critical gaps in performance-aware modeling and manufacturable design generation. The proposed method leverages a continuous signed distance function (SDF) representation to reconstruct and generate smooth, watertight geometries with quantified accuracy. It establishes an interpretable, near-Gaussian latent space that aligns with blade-relevant parameters, such as taper and chord ratios, enabling controlled exploration and unconditional synthesis through interpolation and Gaussian sampling. In addition, a compact neural network maps engineering descriptors, such as maximum directional strains, to latent codes, facilitating the generation of performance-informed geometry. The framework achieves high reconstruction fidelity, with surface distance errors concentrated within $1\%$ of the maximum blade dimension, and demonstrates robust generalization to unseen designs. By integrating constraints, objectives, and performance metrics, this approach advances beyond traditional 2D-guided or unconstrained 3D pipelines, offering a practical and interpretable solution for data-driven turbine blade modeling and concept generation.
tldr: This paper introduces BladeSDF, a generative AI framework using DeepSDF for turbine blade geometry design, enabling controlled generation based on engineering descriptors and achieving high reconstruction fidelity.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了BladeSDF，一个使用DeepSDF的生成式AI框架，用于涡轮叶片几何设计，可以基于工程描述符进行受控生成，并实现高重建保真度。
summary_zh: 生成式人工智能已成为工程设计中一种变革性的范式，能够在保持可行性和性能相关性的前提下，实现复杂3D几何体的自动合成和重建。本文介绍了一种基于DeepSDF的涡轮叶片几何领域专用隐式生成框架，旨在解决性能感知建模和可制造设计生成方面的关键缺口。该方法利用连续符号距离函数(SDF)表示来重建和生成光滑、水密的几何体，并具有量化的精度。它建立了一个可解释的、接近高斯的隐空间，该空间与叶片相关参数（如锥度和弦比）对齐，从而能够通过插值和高斯采样进行受控探索和无条件合成。此外，一个紧凑的神经网络将工程描述符（如最大方向应变）映射到隐码，从而促进性能驱动的几何体生成。该框架实现了高重建保真度，表面距离误差集中在最大叶片尺寸的1%以内，并展示了对未见设计的强大泛化能力。通过整合约束、目标和性能指标，该方法超越了传统的2D引导或无约束3D流程，为数据驱动的涡轮叶片建模和概念生成提供了一种实用且可解释的解决方案。

title: Co-Initialization of Control Filter and Secondary Path via Meta-Learning for Active Noise Control
summary: Active noise control (ANC) must adapt quickly when the acoustic environment changes, yet early performance is largely dictated by initialization. We address this with a Model-Agnostic Meta-Learning (MAML) co-initialization that jointly sets the control filter and the secondary-path model for FxLMS-based ANC while keeping the runtime algorithm unchanged. The initializer is pre-trained on a small set of measured paths using short two-phase inner loops that mimic identification followed by residual-noise reduction, and is applied by simply setting the learned initial coefficients. In an online secondary path modeling FxLMS testbed, it yields lower early-stage error, shorter time-to-target, reduced auxiliary-noise energy, and faster recovery after path changes than a baseline without re-initialization. The method provides a simple fast start for feedforward ANC under environment changes, requiring a small set of paths to pre-train.
tldr: The paper introduces a meta-learning approach (MAML) for co-initializing the control filter and secondary path in active noise control (ANC) systems, improving early-stage performance and adaptation to changing acoustic environments.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于元学习（MAML）的主动噪声控制（ANC）系统中的控制滤波器和次级路径的协同初始化方法，从而改善了早期性能并提高了对变化的声学环境的适应性。
summary_zh: 主动噪声控制(ANC)必须在声学环境改变时迅速适应，然而早期性能很大程度上取决于初始化。我们提出一种与模型无关的元学习(MAML)协同初始化方法来解决这个问题，该方法联合设定基于FxLMS的ANC的控制滤波器和次级通道模型，同时保持运行时算法不变。初始化器使用较短的两阶段内循环，模拟识别和后续的残余噪声降低，在少量测量路径上进行预训练，并通过简单地设置学习到的初始系数来应用。在一个在线次级通道建模FxLMS测试平台中，与没有重新初始化的基线相比，它产生了更低的早期误差、更短的达到目标所需时间、更低的辅助噪声能量，以及路径改变后更快的恢复速度。该方法为前馈ANC在环境变化下提供了一个简单的快速启动，只需要一个很小的路径集合进行预训练。

title: Distribution-Free Confidence Ellipsoids for Ridge Regression with PAC Bounds
summary: Linearly parametrized models are widely used in control and signal processing, with the least-squares (LS) estimate being the archetypical solution. When the input is insufficiently exciting, the LS problem may be unsolvable or numerically unstable. This issue can be resolved through regularization, typically with ridge regression. Although regularized estimators reduce the variance error, it remains important to quantify their estimation uncertainty. A possible approach for linear regression is to construct confidence ellipsoids with the Sign-Perturbed Sums (SPS) ellipsoidal outer approximation (EOA) algorithm. The SPS EOA builds non-asymptotic confidence ellipsoids under the assumption that the noises are independent and symmetric about zero. This paper introduces an extension of the SPS EOA algorithm to ridge regression, and derives probably approximately correct (PAC) upper bounds for the resulting region sizes. Compared with previous analyses, our result explicitly show how the regularization parameter affects the region sizes, and provide tighter bounds under weaker excitation assumptions. Finally, the practical effect of regularization is also demonstrated via simulation experiments.
tldr: This paper extends the Sign-Perturbed Sums (SPS) ellipsoidal outer approximation algorithm to ridge regression, deriving probably approximately correct (PAC) upper bounds for region sizes and demonstrating the effect of regularization via simulations, with tighter bounds under weaker excitation assumptions.
tldr_zh: 本文将符号扰动和(SPS)椭球外近似算法扩展到岭回归，推导出区域大小的可能近似正确(PAC)上界，并通过仿真演示了正则化的效果，在较弱的激励假设下提供了更严格的界限。
summary_zh: 线性参数化模型广泛应用于控制和信号处理领域，其中最小二乘(LS)估计是最典型的解法。当输入激励不足时，最小二乘问题可能无解或数值不稳定。这个问题通常可以通过岭回归进行正则化来解决。虽然正则化估计器降低了方差误差，但量化其估计不确定性仍然很重要。对于线性回归而言，一种可能的方法是使用符号扰动和(SPS)椭球外逼近(EOA)算法构建置信椭球。SPS EOA在噪声独立且关于零对称的假设下构建非渐近置信椭球。本文将SPS EOA算法扩展到岭回归，并推导出所得区域大小的可能近似正确(PAC)上界。与以往的分析相比，我们的结果明确展示了正则化参数如何影响区域大小，并在较弱的激励假设下提供了更紧致的界限。最后，还通过仿真实验展示了正则化的实际效果。

title: The OncoReach Stylet for Brachytherapy: Design Evaluation and Pilot Study
summary: Cervical cancer accounts for a significant portion of the global cancer burden among women. Interstitial brachytherapy (ISBT) is a standard procedure for treating cervical cancer; it involves placing a radioactive source through a straight hollow needle within or in close proximity to the tumor and surrounding tissue. However, the use of straight needles limits surgical planning to a linear needle path. We present the OncoReach stylet, a handheld, tendon-driven steerable stylet designed for compatibility with standard ISBT 15- and 13-gauge needles. Building upon our prior work, we evaluated design parameters like needle gauge, spherical joint count and spherical joint placement, including an asymmetric disk design to identify a configuration that maximizes bending compliance while retaining axial stiffness. Free space experiments quantified tip deflection across configurations, and a two-tube Cosserat rod model accurately predicted the centerline shape of the needle for most trials. The best performing configuration was integrated into a reusable handheld prototype that enables manual actuation. A patient-derived, multi-composite phantom model of the uterus and pelvis was developed to conduct a pilot study of the OncoReach steerable stylet with one expert user. Results showed the ability to steer from less-invasive, medial entry points to reach the lateral-most targets, underscoring the significance of steerable stylets.
tldr: The paper presents a steerable stylet called OncoReach for improving interstitial brachytherapy in cervical cancer treatment, showing promising results in phantom studies.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为OncoReach的可控导丝，用于改善宫颈癌的间质近距离放射治疗，并在体模研究中显示出良好的效果。
summary_zh: 宫颈癌在全球女性癌症负担中占据很大比例。组织间近距离放射治疗 (ISBT) 是治疗宫颈癌的标准流程；它涉及将放射源通过位于肿瘤内部或其近旁的直空心针放置。然而，使用直针将手术计划限制为线性针路径。我们介绍了 OncoReach 导针，一种手持式、腱驱动的可转向导针，旨在与标准 ISBT 15 号和 13 号空心针兼容。在先前工作的基础上，我们评估了诸如针号、球形关节数量和球形关节位置等设计参数，包括一种非对称盘设计，以确定一种在保持轴向刚度的同时最大化弯曲顺应性的构型。自由空间实验量化了不同配置下的针尖偏转，并且双管 Cosserat 杆模型准确地预测了大多数试验中针的中心线形状。性能最佳的配置被集成到一个可重复使用的手持原型中，该原型可实现手动驱动。开发了一种源自患者、多复合材料构建的子宫和骨盆仿真模型，用于对 OncoReach 可转向导针进行一项专家用户先导研究。结果表明，能够从微创的内侧入口点转向到达最外侧靶点，突显了可转向导针的重要性。
